subcodes.first_line: O ye pure leaves! Strive ye in the gathering of teaching, that ye may become a token from the mighty King. Open ye eloquent tongues [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات طیبات در محفل تبلیغ بکوشید تا یرلیغ از ملیک مقتدر باشید لسان بلیغ بگشااید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @being a source of light; guidance, @goodly deeds; actions
